meaning: n.[国名]塞内加尔(西非国家)
examples: Art as psychotherapy is still relatively new in Senegal.
So far, Senegal has made the best progress by planting about 11,000,000 trees.
Even in countries where the number of new infections is dropping, such as Thailand, Uganda and Senegal, small life expectancy drop is forecast.
Before the cold war ended, only three small African countries were proper democracies: Botswana, Mauritius and Senegal.
And Senegal too has been exceptional - it has remained largely peaceful, and fundamentally democratic, since.
